Admin.title: Admin
Admin.description: Administrative users who have access to the dashboard.

News.title: News
News.description: News articles published by the organization.

title.description: The title of the news article

content.description: The content of the news article in markdown or plain text

status.description: Current status of the news article

authorEmail.description: Email of the admin who created the news

Report.title: Report
Report.description: A transparency report linked to an external file (e.g., Google Drive)

url.description: The Google Drive link or other external URL for the PDF

period.description: The period this report covers (e.g., 'January 2025' or 'Q1 2024')

authorEmail.description: Email of the admin who created the report entry

/admins/{adminEmail}.description: Contains documents for authorized administrators. The document ID must match the user's email address to allow for pre-registration.

/news/{newsId}.description: News articles to be displayed on the public site.

/reports/{reportId}.description: Public transparency reports (e.g. PDF links on Google Drive).

/settings/{settingId}.description: Settings documents. The document ID 'donations' will hold the DonationSettings.
